libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image runtime tests on JDK 25/current-defaults, set the same runtime system properties used for 5.0.0: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. The existing condition limited to libraryVersion == '5.0.0' should be extended to cover 5.0.1 or the affected Vert.x 5.0.x/Netty 4.2.x versions. Core coverage can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on localhost; no external service is required. Only add io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 if tests intentionally exercise OAuth2WebClient, because that API depends on an optional dependency.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If the generated tests exercise OAuth2WebClient without adding the optional vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency, compilation may fail; this is avoidable by focusing coverage on the core WebClient, CachingWebClient, WebClientSession, BodyCodec, forms, multipart, redirects, cookies, and local HTTP interactions.
Local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative because the observed failure is runtime-specific to JDK 25 native execution.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 is usable with the normal local Vert.x/WebClient test scaffold and does not need Docker or extra required dependencies, but it still pulls Netty 4.2.x and should carry forward the Java 25 native runtime unsafe-access system properties already needed for 5.0.0.
